default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Landing AI and GrowthX for organic marketing and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Landing AI seeks marketing expertise, particularly in organic growth, after recent leadership changes](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a 12-month engagement starting at $9K/month for editorial content (50K words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2441.0)
  - [Next steps: Schedule follow-up meeting with CEOs to discuss ROI and alignment on organic marketing value](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)

## Topics

### Landing AI Background and Needs

  - [Dev rel Ankit Khare joined Landing AI 4.5 months ago](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Company has two main product lines:](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [Landing Lens: Visual AI for manufacturing (original product)](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [Agentic APIs: New developer-centric products, including document extraction](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Marketing team is lean (Ankit, Grace PMM, Andrea in customer success)](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Recently lost VP of Marketing; CEO currently leading marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Seeking solid marketing help, especially in driving GTM motion](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### GrowthX Offering and Approach

  - [Start with editorial content (50K words/month at $9K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2480.0)
  - [12-month commitment preferred for demonstrating organic growth impact](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2398.0)
  - [Team structure: Managing directors (strategy), managing editors (quality), content managers (execution)](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Custom workflows available for specific needs (e.g., podcast content repurposing)](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2168.0)
  - [Focus on building a "publication" of rich, effective answers for target ICP](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)

### Potential Collaboration Benefits

  - [GrowthX can help optimize Landing AI's "leaky" website and blog stack](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage Andrew Ng's influence for organic marketing](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [GrowthX's experience with similar stage companies (e.g., Galileo AI)](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Potential for custom workflows to automate content creation and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)

### ROI and CEO Concerns

  - [Landing AI CEO may need convincing on organic marketing ROI](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2925.0)
  - [GrowthX prepared to discuss long-term benefits and compound growth of organic investment](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=3075.0)
  - [Comparison to conference investments ($300K) vs. 12-month GrowthX engagement ($108K)](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=3026.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ankit to brief Landing AI CEO on GrowthX discussion and potential value](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2597.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with Marcel (GrowthX), Landing AI CEO, and Ankit](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
  - [GrowthX to send SOW (Statement of Work) and Slack channel invite for further communication](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=3305.0)
  - [Aim to schedule follow-up meeting before Marcel's Hawaii trip (Thursday-Monday window)](https://fathom.video/share/FwFLGWiV19LsiKQmHFBSEUR6bsxG8fYy?tab=summary&timestamp=3204.0)

action_items.description: Brief CEO on GrowthX offering - incl. ROI potential, success stories, execution approach, organic growth value
Schedule follow-up call w/ Marcel, CEO, Kyle for Thu-Mon (before Marcel's Hawaii trip Tue)
Send meeting recording link to Ankit via email
Create Slack channel for ongoing communication w/ Ankit; send invite
Email SOW doc to Ankit - incl. engagement details, pricing, deliverables for editorial service
